messages.content: Kenneth, Tampa General just posted a clinical pharmacist role. The director is a former colleague of mine. Shall I make an introduction? I also sent you the posting by email.
Just saw this. Yes please, that would be great.
Excellent. I will reach out to Dr. Pham this week. I also recommended you connect with Marcus Webb at TGH. He was a student of mine.
Thank you Dr. Chen. Really appreciate it.
Dr. Chen, I got a phone screen at Tampa General. January 14.
That is wonderful news, Kenneth. Prepare thoroughly. They will focus on formulary management and clinical protocols.
Phone screen went well. They want to schedule an in-person interview.
Excellent. Keep me posted on the date. Happy to help you prepare.
In-person interview at TGH was today. I think it went well.
Very glad to hear it. Dr. Pham is thorough but fair. I am confident you presented yourself well. Let me know when you hear back.
got lightning tix for tmrw. you in?
we gotta go more this season
thats what i like to hear
bro I just ran the numbers and after loans and rent I have like $400 left for everything else
bro thats rough. CVS doesnt pay you enough
its insane dude. like where does it all go
rent car payment loans insurance. its all just gone
plus the tacoma brakes last month destroyed me
oh yeah how much was that again
you need to find something that pays better fr
i know. retail pharmacy is a scam
there has to be hospital jobs or something right
yeah theres stuff out there. just need to actually apply
do it bro. stop complaining and just apply
lol alright. gonna look into it
yeah ill pick u up at 5
bro I think im gonna apply to TGH
dr chen forwarded me the posting today
thats way better than counting pills for roland
the pay is probly better too
bro you gotta get out of CVS
youve been complaining about that place since june
yeah i know. updating my resume this weekend
im gonna have coffee with marcus webb too hes at TGH now
wait the guy from pharmacy school??
basically told me im not selling enough flu shots
pulled me aside and went on about commitment to wellness initiatives
im a pharmacist not a salesman
dude just leave already. apply to TGH
i know. been getting his weekly metric emails for like 6 weeks
i told him that to his face
that im a pharmacist not a salesman
nah im gonna pay for that one
put me on every bad shift. watch me extra close
hes definately gonna be on my case now
just get the TGH gig and dip
yeah. if they even call me back
vanessa is coming down. parents are going to atlanta
bro ur cooking a whole turkey??
yeah. how hard can it be
my legs are destroyed from that hike
already got trina lined up for sunday
u got the system down lmao
roland would lose his mind if he knew
i got the cooler and drinks
holiday lightning game tonight. got tix
our seats at this point lol
we went to like every lightning game this year lol
just drinks. i got the food
dude ur going all out. im telling jake and mike
that was the best meal ive ever had
no for real. the prime rib was insane
told u i know what im doing in the kitchen
ur hosting every holiday from now on
jake said the potatoes were life changing
merry christmas bro. thanks for real
merry christmas dude. glad everyone came
dude ive always wanted to go to seattle
same. found some airbnbs in capitol hill for like 180 a night
still looking at a few. ill send when i pick one
like 2500 maybe. flights food airbnb everything
mariners play the As march 28. we could get tix
pike place. space needle. the whole thing
lets do it. im gonna start looking at flights
just dont tell them about the flu shot drama lmao
went pretty good actually. they wanna schedule an in person
sometime in february. theyll send details
you better take the day off from CVS
got my navient year end summary today
ill be paying this off until im 40
bro its midnight stop looking at that
nah bro youll get that TGH job and itll be different
phone screen went good but who knows
bro they wanna do an in person thats huge
thats not how it works lol
ok but still. hospital pay is way better than CVS
hard to think positive staring at 78 thousand in debt
start packing your CVS name tag lmao
lol calm down. still havent heard back
when do they let u know
the wait is gonna kill u
yeah i know. gotta act normal at cvs in teh meantime
just keep ur head down and dont piss off roland
5 teriyaki bowls ready for the week
how do u have time for this
i had cold pizza for breakfast
this is why u need to meal prep
make me some next time ill pay u
come over next sunday ill show u how
yo so for seattle should we split the airbnb or do separate rooms
split for sure. its already booked at 180 a night
bet. also you good on money for this? flights and airbnb and mariners tix and everything. I can front you if you need, just pay me back whenever
capitol hill one. the 180 a night spot
the one near all the bars right
also got the mariners tix already
and japanese breakfast tickets at the crocodile
shared the trip on trippy too check ur email
bro we gotta hit pike place market first day
yeah on trippy. the whole 5 days planned out
day 2 is pike place then the crocodile show at night
cascades day hike. rattlesnake ledge or wallace falls
bro this trip is gonna be legendary
yo what time we landing in sea
do it. cheaper rn than next week
airbnb host sent the check in stuff
packing rn. is it gonna rain the whole time
checked. like 50/50. bring a rain shell
got that piroshky thing u said
garlic fries were better than the game
worth it tho. views were insane
agreed. need to do this again
discover bill is gonna hurt tho
Hey K, how's your weekend going?
I'm stuck cleaning out my closet and need a distraction
Where were you that you had no service??
Oh fun! Where did you guys go?
That sounds amazing actually. Did you hike?
yeah did a long one yesterday
Ha I love that. You need more weekends like this instead of working all the time
yeah it was good to get out
Wait don't you usually work Sundays?
Nice. Well I'm glad you're getting fresh air! Send me pics if you took any 📸
Enjoy the rest of your weekend! 💛
yep. first harvest off the patio
Kenneth those look amazing! How many did you get?
five big ones and a couple small ones
I'm so impressed. When did you plant them?
back in april. they took forever honestly
That's so cool that you stuck with it though
yeah its been fun. pretty chill hobby
What are you going to do with them?
stuffed peppers tmrw. found a recipe on youtube
No but seriously save me some for when I visit! The garden sounds great
for sure. jalapenos going crazy too
I love it 💚 Keep me updated!
Hey how's everything going? Saving okay?
yeah all good. budgets on track
Good! I know the loans are a lot but you're doing great
appreciate it. im fine tho seriously
Okay I believe you 🙂 Are you coming up for Thanksgiving?
yeah planning to drive up wednesday
Mom has been asking. She's already planning the menu 😂
I'll be there Wednesday too. It'll be so nice to have everyone together 💛
yeah should be good. bringing some jalapenos from the garden
Wait your garden is still going? That's amazing
jalapenos are going crazy actually. fall weather is perfect for them
Hey K, so change of plans. Mom and dad are going to aunt Helen's in Atlanta this year
Yeah they decided last minute. So I don't have Thanksgiving plans now 😅
Wait really? You'd do a whole Thanksgiving?
yeah why not. ive been cooking a lot
That actually sounds amazing. I can drive down Wednesday morning and be there around 2?
What are you making?? I need to know what I'm walking into
turkey. garlic mashed potatoes. green bean casserole. probably a pie
Kenneth Liu cooking a whole turkey. I have to see this 😂
I'll bring wine and something for dessert. See you Wednesday at 2! ❤️
Hey! Just confirming for tomorrow. Leaving Orlando around 10, should be at your place by 2
Do you need me to bring anything besides wine?
nah i got everything. maybe cranberry sauce if u see it
On it! I'm excited to see your place and your garden 🌶️
lol its not much but its mine
Hey K! How's February treating you?
Are you doing anything fun for spring break? You should take some time off
probably just working. maybe a weekend hike
Kenneth you work too hard. You need a real vacation
im fine V. got some stuff in the works
just outdoors stuff. might do some camping
That's good at least! You deserve a break 💛
thanks V. hows everything with you
Good! Hey what are you doing for spring break? I was thinking about driving down to Tampa that last week of March. We could do something fun
oh nice. not sure yet honestly, might just be working
Wait do you have PTO that week? I just looked at the calendar and theres a block on yours that says PTO. Are you taking time off?? Where are you going
oh that. i swapped some shifts around so i could take a few days
prob just doing some stuff around tampa
Aw ok. Was thinking of coming down but I'll find another weekend then
Hey K. Mom asked if you're coming up for Easter
tell her i'll let her know in a week or two
How was your week off? Did anything fun?
yeah was good. caught up on stuff. did a hike
Hey Ken can you take my Saturday 11/1? I'll cover your Sunday 11/9
Have fun this weekend! I've got Sunday covered
Hey Ken, same deal for 11/23? My cousin's wedding is that Saturday. I'll take your Sunday
You're the best. Have a great weekend!
Hey would you want to swap again for Dec 14? I'll cover your Sunday like usual
yeah thanks for covering again. owe you
Please, you cover for me all the time. We're even 😊
Roland came in today with that look again. Spent 20 min talking about flu shot numbers
yeah he emailed me too. 18th of 24 stores
It's so frustrating. We're actually good pharmacists. The flu shot thing is just sales
Hey Ken are we splitting the inventory count or doing it together Thursday?
I'll take rx backstock and refrigerated 👍
wednesday morning. got stuff in the afternoon
Ok I'll do Thursday. That vitamin aisle takes forever lol
yeah not looking forward to it
finished my sections. emailed you the counts
Did you see Roland's reminder email 😂
hey trina can u take my sunday march 1? garrett wants to do a day trip to myakka

Yeah I got you. Oh btw Roland just texted me asking if we could both join a quick call Monday to go over the March schedule together. He said something about making sure the rotation is fair this quarter. Can you text him back and say we are both available? Im at my cousins wedding rn
u still good with me covering 3/29
yes please. i owe u big
u back? store inventory tmrw fyi
Kenneth the turkey was INCREDIBLE. I can't believe you pulled that off
The mashed potatoes were so good. And you used your own jalapenos in the cornbread?
Mom is going to be so jealous when she sees the photos. I'm sending them now
Thanks again for an amazing Thanksgiving K. Drive safe tomorrow ❤️
glad you came down. safe drive back
yall see ghost of yotei drops friday
bro the gameplay trailer was insane
been waiting all year for this
worth it. ghost of tsushima was goated
gonna wait a week see if its buggy
bro u always say that then buy it anyway
whoever gets it first has to stream it in the chat
ill wait for a sale probly
mike u never pay full price for anything lol
its so good. the snow stuff is crazy
told u. the stealth missions are wild
still waiting for black friday lol
K's place has the best setup
yea works for me. ill be off by 7
make it 8. need to shower after work lol
yotei co-op is actually good now after that update
cool ill grab beer and order pizza
bro u dont have to do everything
ill bring a case of modelo
we could also hit that new warzone map after
bro we literally just decided yotei
ok ok yotei first then warzone
yo kenny you doing fantasy this year? draft is sunday
8pm sunday. espn league same as last year. need one more
Hey Kenneth! How are you? I feel like we havent talked since graduation
hey! yeah its been a while. good tho. hows walgreens
Its good! Im at the Sarasota location now. We should grab coffee sometime if youre ever down here
hey man ill be in tampa dec 20-22 for a conference. you around?
oh nice yeah lmk when ur free
will do! been too long bro
Hey this is 3B. Kitchen faucet has been dripping since last night
Got it. I can come by tomorrow between 10-12 if that works
Hi! An Amazon package got delivered to my door but it has your name on it. Want me to leave it at yours?
oh yeah thats mine. ill grab it thanks
Did anyone elses power go out on Henderson? TECO said 2 hours
Back on now. That was annoying
Heads up someone broke into a car on Osborne overnight. Check your vehicles
Ugh not again. Thanks for the heads up
Holiday schedule posted. Check your assignments by end of day.
Flu shot push continues through January. Check your weekly targets.
we still on tonight? need at least 8
in. bringing my boy marcus too
gg. my legs are done lol
running late but save me a spot
bringing 3 new guys from my gym. gonna be competitive
told u. dude in the lebron jersey was insane
best run weve had in months
no game this week. gym floor getting refinished
whos in tonight. got 6 so far
anyone see baycare is hiring? clinical pharmacist oncology
nice. im happy at publix tho lol
hey does anyone have Dr. Chens email? need a reference letter
Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Martinez on 11/14 at 2:00 PM. Reply Y to confirm or C to cancel.

Hey Kenneth hope the interview went well! Let me know if theres anything else I can do
hey kenneth. garrett said you might be down for game night friday
maybe next time man. got a lot going on rn
